name: Oatmeal Cake with Lazy Daisy Frosting
recipeInstructions: Measure oats into mixing bowl. Add boiling water and stir until cooled. In a separate bowl, beat together both sugars, butter, and shortening. Gradually add eggs and vanilla, beating very well. Sift dry ingredients (flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt) together in another bowl. Alternately add the oatmeal mixture and sifted dry ingredients to the creamed sugar mixture. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x13x2 inch pan. Bake for 30-40 minutes at 350 degrees F (preheated oven). Remove cake from oven and let cool slightly before spreading Dais frosting evenly over hot cake surface. Place cake under broiler briefly to achieve desired color, watching carefully not to burn. Frosting: Combine all ingredients in a bowl until smooth; spread over the warm cake.
